channel.title: Prop Wash Daily
channel.description: Fresh takes for FPV drone pilots and builders.

item.title: Community pulse: what r/Multicopter is debating this week
item.description: The arguments, consensus shifts, and quietly useful threads from the regulations community this week.

item.title: The simulators checklist: run this before you spend
item.description: Seven questions that separate a justified simulators purchase from an expensive mood.

item.title: Five mistakes everyone makes in their first month of freestyle
item.description: The most common early stumbles in freestyle, and the cheap corrections that fix them for FPV drone pilots and builders.

item.title: "fpv simulator practice" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about fpv simulator practice through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.

item.title: Ask the forge: your regulations questions, answered
item.description: Straight answers to the regulations questions FPV drone pilots and builders keep asking, minus the hedging.

item.title: The quiet upgrade: small tweaks in simulators with outsized returns
item.description: No purchases, no overhauls — the modest simulators adjustments that FPV drone pilots and builders report mattering most.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: fpv simulator practice
item.description: The persistent myths around fpv simulator practice, stress-tested against what FPV drone pilots and builders actually report.

item.title: A weekend project: level up your builds in two hours
item.description: One contained, satisfying builds project for FPV drone pilots — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.

item.title: Community pulse: what r/drones is debating this week
item.description: The arguments, consensus shifts, and quietly useful threads from the regulations community this week.

item.title: The simulators checklist: run this before you spend
item.description: Seven questions that separate a justified simulators purchase from an expensive mood.

item.title: The state of Builds in 2026
item.description: A field report on builds: where things stand, and what FPV drone pilots and builders should do next.

item.title: Starter guide: Freestyle without the overwhelm
item.description: A practical on-ramp to freestyle for FPV drone pilots and builders — one repeatable workflow, no gear debt.

item.title: "fpv drone starter kit" — separating signal from noise
item.description: Thousands of people search "fpv drone starter kit" every month. Most of what they find is recycled. Here is what holds up.

item.title: Why FPV drone pilots are rethinking Simulators
item.description: A quiet shift is underway in how FPV drone pilots and builders approach simulators — less maximalism, more maintenance.

item.title: Regulations on a budget: what actually matters
item.description: Where money changes outcomes in regulations — and the line items that are pure vanity.

item.title: What to watch next in Freestyle: five quiet shifts
item.description: Ignore the headlines — these are the slower currents reshaping freestyle for FPV drone pilots and builders.
